creator: tj+freebsd_bugs@a13.fr
text:
Created attachment 179277
new port `x11-wm/rubygem-uh-wm' shar file

uhwm is a minimalistic tiling and stacking window manager for X. It
shares some similarities with dwm and wmii, but is written in ruby so
you can configure and extend features directly with ruby code.

WWW: https://rubygems.org/gems/uh-wm


  I'm the author of this gem, and can maintain the port.

  I would like this port added to `x11-wm' category. Thanks a lot!
